programme.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sinbad and the vizier of Marabia followed by evil magician Koura seek the three golden tablets that can gain them access to the ancient temple of the Oracle of All Knowledge

programme.title: Surf Ninjas
programme.desc: Brothers Johnny and Adam surfers from California discover that they are in fact heirs to a tiny South Pacific island nation They also discover their hidden talents while fending off a warlord

programme.title: TBH 126
programme.desc: TBH 126

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E25
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E25

programme.title: Munsters 137
programme.desc: Munsters 137

programme.title: Addams Family 104
programme.desc: Addams Family 104

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Love Boat

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy goes looking for a self-styled tribal healer he ran out of the area when he finds that the man has the antidote for the venom of a deadly spider that has just bitten Paula

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Stanleys evening at a singles bar ends with a murder and its up to Jonathan and Jennifer to find out who set him up

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey try to uncover the connection between 3 strangled women and an adult telephone line

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonballs arch enemy Homer Bedloe has arrived in the valley on some undisclosed business All he seems to be doing is riding the train Sam and Joe believe hes out to get Wendell who they think will incriminate himself through his naivety honesty and helpful manner at all cost as much of that help isnt part of his railroad job and as the result of his actions often is at the expense of keeping on schedule They ultimately learn that Bedloe is watching Wendells performance to use as an excuse to scrap the Cannonball in favor of a bus service for the valley which in turn would put the Shady Rest out of business as there is no road that goes by the hotel Although Bedloe requires an impartial and reliable third party verification of his report he is hoping to use Janet Janet in turn comes up with an idea that no one else in the valley has ever thought about in dealing with Bedloes mean ways A cake sent to the Elliotts from Granny in Beverly Hills plays an unwitting but ultimately important part in Janets plan

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo arrives back to Hooterville from a gig in Omaha with her new boyfriend the shows headliner comedian Rick Wayne Rick doesnt make a very good first impression in Hooterville - in Steves words hes always on - but Billie Jo ensures everyone that theyll get to love him the way she does Billie Jo thinks that a good way for him to ingratiate himself into the hearts of the valley residents is for him to star in the Hooterville charity radio show much to the chagrin of saxophonist Selma who saw herself as the star of the show Rick agrees if only to please Billie Jo Billie Jo wishes she could take back the invitation when she hears a part of Ricks routine for the show which is a put-down of the valley and its residents Billie Jo has to figure out how to get Rick from doing that routine which would make her and Rick personae non gratae in valley

programme.title: TBH 102
programme.desc: TBH 102

programme.title: TBH 134
programme.desc: TBH 134

programme.title: Munsters 134
programme.desc: Munsters 134

programme.title: Addams Family 134

programme.desc: Addams Family 133

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E10
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E10

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After Natalies brother is fatally wounded by a gunman she prevails upon Nick to turn him into a vampire giving him eternal life

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki discovers that a deadly item from her past has resurfaced a satanic coin that can bring the dead back to life

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Smart 422
programme.desc: Smart 422

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogans gang steals Klinks code book from his safe photographs the contents and returns it to its proper place But theres a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Trouble follows when Gruber - In competition with a hometown neighbor for the greatest War Hero - Is awarded a Purple Heart for a small cut on his finger which he got while doing laundry

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys go all out to try to help Parker win the attention of a very attractive Nurse hes infatuated with

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carters platoon takes part in war games and Gomers naive ways cause more problems than Sgt Carter can handle Will Gomers actions get Carter the boot

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Woods ex-con brother comes to town in hopes of getting his High School diploma

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Merleen finds her calling by painting nudes--starting with husband Harlan

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A headlining talented versatile illusionist and female impersonator is receiving bizarre death threats His manager says hes just over reacting When he reaches out to Dan Tanna for help Dan begins also to get death threats

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a prostitute is murdered one of Jennifers former sources asks her to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project but the others are worried about his involvement When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet the Earth is in danger

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A woman who has dedicated her life to a prominent family fails to see her neglected son has fallen in with a psycho - and may have helped him kill a woman

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles David Janssen anti-smog crusading friend Laurence Naismith has him deliver a package secretly containing a bomb to a polluting factory unaware that children are there

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While in Mexico tending to a Barkley mine Heath aids a Mexican General an old family friend who escapes the wrath of an oppressive leader When it is found out that the General is living in California at the Barkley Ranch Heath is jailed - and his life is used to bargain for the Generals return

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is escorting a bride and 5000 to his boss He meets a friend who works now for the railroad who tells Cheyenne a group of young bandits are robbing trains They strike the train but their goal is more than robbing it

programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Day of the Dead

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 26 filmed at the Art Hauser Centre in Prince Albert. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Brendan Mooney vs. Brad Lammy; Tyrone Halkett vs. Brad Campbell; Thomas Richardson vs. Cody Bowman; Evander Masuskapoe vs. Randell Martell; Devon Smith vs. Elias Cepeda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tara LaRosa v. Amanda Buckner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
